name: Son Xoriguer
description: A wide sandy beach some 10 km from Ciutadella, with a more natural right-hand side and rocks in the water. It marks the boundary between the developed south-western coast and the unspoilt southern shore, and is a common starting point for boat excursions.

highlights: a wide beach about 10 km from Ciutadella, with a more natural right-hand side
marks the boundary between the built-up coast and the south's unspoilt coves
departure point for boat trips and water sports; direct access by car
